layoutRegions.name: outcome-hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize overturned archive purge appeal outcomes and expose the outcome sealing action.

layoutRegions.name: outcome-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare appeal outcome ledgers, settlement state, release receipts, and delegated re-approval attestations.

layoutRegions.name: reconciliation-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect retry hash objection outcomes, checksum proof acceptance, and rollback-safe reconciliation packet exhibits.

components.name: OutcomeCard
components.purpose: Overturned appeal outcome summary with settlement, attestation, and reconciliation progress.
interactions: status chip highlights sealed, reconciling, or review state
progress bar communicates reconciliation readiness without layout shift

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense row for outcome ledgers, retention settlements, release receipts, attestations, and checksum acceptance.
interactions: state label remains visible at narrow widths
row content stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: ReconciliationPacket
components.purpose: Rollback-safe command and exhibit checklist for sealing an overturned appeal outcome.
interactions: packet fields preserve long command text without overlapping neighboring panels
checklist remains readable on mobile and desktop

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
